details.content: This item has been tested to certify it can ship safely in its original box or bag to avoid unnecessary packaging. Since 2015, we have reduced the weight of outbound packaging per shipment by 41% on average, that’s over 2 million tons of packaging material.If you still require Amazon packaging for this item, choose "Ship in Amazon packaging" at checkout. item_specifications.special_feature: Non Skid Bottom, Orthopedic, Removable Cover, Washable, Water Resistant

about_item: 🐶COMFORT AS PRIORITY: Large Dog bed with C-shape chaise design creates a cozy and inviting space that promotes comfort and security, offering your pet a variety of cozy positions to snuggle. The fence-like design makes the dogs feel more secure lying in it. The 4-sided 3.5" side bolster of dog pillow adds extra support to your pet's neck and head on for optimum lounging comfort.

🐶ORTHOPEDIC SUPPORT: Orthopedic dog bed features high-density egg foam soothes pressure points helps distribute weight evenly and provides great support for aching joints and muscles so pets can enjoy a more restorative night's rest. While fluff-filled bolsters support the neck, back, hips, and joints; helps ease discomfort and promote restful sleep.

🐶WATERPROOF & WASHABLE DOG BED: The dog bed features a removable, machine-washable cover with a zipper for easy to quick remove and care, so just throw it in the washing machine and will be as good as new, ensuring your pet's space stays fresh and hygienic. The waterproof inner lining fully protect the foam from spills, water damage, or accidents, prolonging the product's life.

🐶ULTRA SOFT SLEEP SURFACE: The sleeping surface of the dog beds large sized dog features luxurious Fish scale pattern plush make it super soft, cozy and not easy to shedding, the skin-friendly and comfortable surface provides a calm and anti-anxiety feeling for your pet, allowing pets to fall into a deep sleep.

🐶SIZE DETAILS: Orthopedic Dog Bed, Medium, 28" x 23" x 6.5" (3.5" Base Foam Height; Sleep Surface: Approx. 20.5" x 19") For Dogs Up to 30 lbs. Large - 35" x 25" x 6.5" (3.5" Base Foam Height; Sleep Surface: Approx. 26.5" x 20") For Dogs Up to 50 lbs. Extra Large - 42" x 32" x 6.5" (3.5" Base Foam Height; Sleep Surface: Approx. 34" x 27.5") For Dogs Up to 90 lbs. XXL -48" x 35" x 6.5" (3.5" Base Foam Height; Sleep Surface: Approx. 39.5" x 31") For Dogs Up to 120 lbs.

summary.text: Customers find the dog bed to be of good quality, perfect for large dogs, and appreciate its comfort and value for money. The bed receives positive feedback for its softness, with one customer noting it has lots of cushion to lie on, and many mentioning it's ideal for giant breeds like Golden Retrievers and German Shepherds. The durability receives mixed reviews - while some say it's holding together wonderfully, others report it ripping within weeks. The thickness is also a concern, with several customers noting the foam is on the thin side.

great dog bed, spacious and easy to set up. My dog loves it, worth the price.
Bed is thick and seems to be good quality. Plenty of room for my 145 lb Saint Bernard! Would definitely buy again!
...they are vacuum packed so when I decided to return them because of poor quality, I boxed them the best I could one was never opened one I had to...

authors_reviews.title: Great Bed!
authors_reviews.text: My dog loves this new bed! He was so excited when I was putting it together for him that when I was picking up the foam to put the cover on it, he nudged me away and layed on thr cover before the foam was even there, lol! I got it put together and let it set for 48 hrs per directions and then let him lay on it. He loves his new bed. I bought it to use in the bedroom so when I'm in there he will have a soft cozy spot to lay down and he goes in there to use it day when he isn't using his other one.The price was great! I like that I can wash the cover. Love the look, material and construction of this bed. The color was as appeared on the site. The zipper is good. So far all is great with thos bed.
authors_reviews.author: Kindle Customer

authors_reviews.title: My dogs LOVE it!!
authors_reviews.text: I have three dogs and they all love this bed. It is very large for my German Shepard and the sides are firm for her to lay her head on them, I like that I can remove the cover and wash it. Usually my Pitbull and little Valhund are sleeping in it together. I am so happy I finally found a nice well made bed for a great price.
authors_reviews.author: Debbie Sue

authors_reviews.title: Recommended
authors_reviews.text: For an inexpensive bed it's high quality. My dog loves it.
authors_reviews.author: M. Paladino

authors_reviews.title: Great Dog Bed
authors_reviews.text: My dog absolutely loves this bed! It’s easy to assemble and just as easy to take apart when it’s time to wash it, which is a huge plus. I am constantly having to wash his beds so the washability matters. The color is great, and my dog seems to think it’s comfortable since he spends a lot of time lounging in it. I was a little surprised by how well it fit in the box it came in—thought it might be a bit bulky for shipping, but it was fine. One thing to note: I have a 75lb pitbull, and I ordered the large, thinking it would be big enough, but I should’ve paid more attention to the dimensions. It’s a bit snug for him, so I’d recommend going up a size if you have a larger dog. Also, since my dog doesn’t chew on his things, I can’t speak to the durability in that regard, but the material feels pretty sturdy. Overall, a great bed at a good price! Just make sure to double-check the size if you’ve got a bigger pup.
authors_reviews.author: Kelsey

authors_reviews.title: Meets expectations
authors_reviews.text: This XXL dog bed is absolutely perfect for my Great Dane! Finding a bed big enough for her to fully stretch out is always a challenge, but this one has plenty of room and is extremely comfortable. The size is exactly as described, and the padding is thick and supportive.I also love that the cover is washable—it makes cleanup so easy, especially with a large dog. The quality feels great. My dog took to it immediately and now sleeps on it all the time.Highly recommend this bed for anyone with a large or giant breed!
authors_reviews.author: Emily

authors_reviews.title: Big and comfy
authors_reviews.text: I bought the largest bed. One dog weighs about 130lbs the other weighs 60lbs. They both like to share one bed (for some reason) and they can both fit on it at the same time. It has retained its shape and they seem to like it. I originally bought this one for the larger dog and ended up buying a second one for the smaller dog since they both like it. Recommend.
authors_reviews.author: James&Kate

authors_reviews.title: Very comfortable
authors_reviews.text: Perfect! My hound/lab girl loves it, and it's easy to wash. You can unzip the bed to remove the foam so the cover can be washed. Very good quality also!
authors_reviews.author: Dave

authors_reviews.title: Good but less structured than others
authors_reviews.text: Good basic dog bed. I actually prefer the other bed (also pictured for comparison) because it’s more structured and full, but the cool silver tone didn’t blend as well with our warmer-toned room.The base on this one is slightly flatter than the other bed we tried, though not enough to make a big difference in comfort. The main downside is the bolsters, they’re not as full or supportive and tend to flatten more quickly over time. The other bed shown has a large, round removable bolster that fits into a zippered pocket, while this one uses loose fill that you have to knead to fluff back up.It still works well for everyday use, just not as durable or structured long-term. Please note that I ordered the "Grey" bed and the inside is actually a darker grey than what the stock photo shows (which shows a lighter grey on the inside).
authors_reviews.author: Experiencer1

other_countries_reviews.title: Excelente compra :]
other_countries_reviews.text: A mi perro le encantó (bóxer), está de buen tamaño (XL) para razas grandes.El colchón recupera su forma original sin problemas y es de buen grosor.
other_countries_reviews.author: Camila HM

other_countries_reviews.title: Dog loves it!
other_countries_reviews.text: Looks great - and our dog loves it
other_countries_reviews.author: Samantha Lee

other_countries_reviews.title: Comfortable and doesn’t chew it
other_countries_reviews.text: This is the third bed I have bought for my dog (pug). He tore apart the other beds, not this type. Also, other than destroying it, he didn’t use it. He actually lyes on this and enjoys it. I was definitely uncertain whether to purchase it after some of the reviews I read. This is the perfect bed for my dog, thank you.
other_countries_reviews.author: Debbie

other_countries_reviews.title: Dogs say yes they love it
other_countries_reviews.text: The dogs use it everyday - I have 4 dogs and they run to be first to this bed! Great product. Great that you can supper off the top to wash.
